# aquasec_secure_ai_integration (Resource)

Manages the Secure AI integration settings in Aqua. This is a singleton resource — only one instance can exist. It configures which AI security provider (Akamai or Aqua) is active and its connection parameters.

~> **Note:** This resource manages a singleton settings object. Destroying it only removes it from Terraform state; the settings persist on the server.

~> **Note:** The server clears sensitive fields (`api_key`, `id`) on read. The provider preserves user-provided values from state to avoid perpetual diffs.

~> **Note:** The Aqua provider's `api_key`, `id`, and `mode` are controlled server-side via the `AQUA_AI_TOKEN` and `AQUA_AI_ID` environment variables. Values set in Terraform for the `aqua` block are overridden by the server.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "aquasec_secure_ai_integration" "example" {
  selected_ui = "akamai"

  akamai {
    api_key = var.akamai_api_key
    id      = "akamai-provider-id"
    enabled = true
    mode    = "external"
  }
}
```

## Import

The Secure AI integration can be imported using the fixed ID `secure_ai`:

```shell
terraform import aquasec_secure_ai_integration.example secure_ai
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `selected_ui` (String) The selected UI provider for Secure AI (e.g. `akamai`, `aqua`).

### Optional

- `akamai` (Block List, Max: 1) Akamai Secure AI provider configuration. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--akamai))
- `aqua` (Block List, Max: 1) Aqua Secure AI provider configuration. Note: the server overrides Aqua provider parameters from environment variables (`AQUA_AI_TOKEN`, `AQUA_AI_ID`). (see [below for nested schema](#nestedblock--aqua))

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.

<a id="nestedblock--akamai"></a>
### Nested Schema for `akamai`

Optional:

- `api_key` (String, Sensitive) API key for the Secure AI provider.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether this Secure AI provider is enabled.
- `id` (String) Identifier for the Secure AI provider.
- `mode` (String) Mode of the Secure AI provider (`external` or `internal`).


<a id="nestedblock--aqua"></a>
### Nested Schema for `aqua`

Optional:

- `api_key` (String, Sensitive) API key for the Secure AI provider. Server-controlled via `AQUA_AI_TOKEN` environment variable.
- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether this Secure AI provider is enabled.
- `id` (String) Identifier for the Secure AI provider. Server-controlled via `AQUA_AI_ID` environment variable.
- `mode` (String) Mode of the Secure AI provider (`external` or `internal`). Server-controlled.
